508.reason: [The while loop may cause an infinite loop or ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException because it does not check if the token exists before accessing its line number, and it does not increment i properly when the line number changes.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The while loop may cause an infinite loop or ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException because it does not check if the token exists before accessing its line number, and it does not increment i properly when the line number changes.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The while loop may cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException if getTokenByOff(i) returns null when i exceeds the token list size, and it does not check for null before accessing getLineNumber().]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Potential NullPointerException: getTokenByOff(i) may return null if i is out of bounds. This will cause a NullPointerException when calling .getLineNumber() on null, leading to program crash and empty output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.05555555555555555 , reason:  [getTokenByOff(i) may return null at EOF, causing NullPointerException and potential infinite loop]

948.reason: [The method does not handle missing tokens for other expected token types (e.g., ASSIGN, LPARENT, LBRACE, etc.), which violates the error reporting requirements. Additionally, it doesn't consume or skip erroneous tokens, potentially causing infinite loops or cascading errors.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The method does not handle missing tokens for other expected token types (e.g., ASSIGN, LPARENT, LBRACE, etc.), which violates the error reporting requirements. Additionally, it doesn't consume or skip erroneous tokens, potentially causing infinite loops or cascading errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The match method does not handle the case when an unexpected token is encountered for other expected types (not SEMICN, RPARENT, or RBRACK), leading to silent skipping instead of error reporting. This can cause incorrect parsing or missing error detection for required tokens like ASSIGN, LBRACE, etc.]
